meta.title: Security Dashboards for Plant Managers
meta.description:
Pia Capra tells the S4 audience what security information the Plant Managers want to see and why? Cyber is on their radar, but they lack technical expertise. And cybersecurity is only one of many issues the Plant Managers are worried about.

Then Pia shows some sample security dashboards for Plant Managers that provide visibility of cyber risk and how it could affect their Operations and KPI.
